content: {"file":"src/core/di/injector.ts","summary":"The file src/core/di/injector.ts contains core logic for dependency injection in Angular, including the creation and management of injectors. It defines classes like Injector and NullInjector, provides methods to create injectors from definitions or arrays of providers, and includes error handling mechanisms.","rules":[{"name":"Create Injector","description":"Creates an injector based on a definition type, parent injector, and additional providers.","conditions":["defType is provided"],"actions":["createInjector"]},{"name":"Error Handling","description":"Handles errors by logging them to the console and optionally logging the original error if present.","conditions":["error is not null"],"actions":["log error message"]}],"dependencies":["@angular/core","rxjs"]}` khớ
